message:
fix(codegen): Capture self parameter in TryHelper structs

Previously, 'self' was explicitly skipped when building read_only_vars
for TryHelper structs, causing "'self' not accessible from inner function"
errors when methods used self inside try blocks.

The fix:
1. Remove the skip condition for 'self'/'__self'
2. Add 'self'/'__self' to the read_only_vars capture condition

This allows method self references to be properly captured and accessible
within TryHelper struct bodies.

Reduces test_raise.py compile errors from ~18 to 5.
